findings.message: lspServers command uses ty@latest which always fetches the newest release; a breaking or compromised release auto-deploys to all plugin users
'quick one-off checks' uses vague 'quick'; colloquially acceptable but could be more precise
'quick one-off checks' uses vague 'quick'; same pattern as ruff/SKILL.md
Vague qualifier 'clearly' weakens the instruction; the reader cannot determine what 'clearly needed' means without additional context
Redundant double 'only' in the same sentence is a copy-editing error that reduces clarity

Vague qualifier 'clearly' weakens the instruction; the reader cannot determine what 'clearly needed' means without additional context — Line 84: "Don't use the pip interface unless clearly needed." — 'clearly' is a vague condition without concrete signals

Redundant double 'only' in the same sentence is a copy-editing error that reduces clarity — Line 71: "Only use `uv tool install` only when specifically requested" — 'only' appears twice in the same clause
'quick one-off checks' uses vague 'quick'; colloquially acceptable but could be more precise
'quick one-off checks' uses vague 'quick'; same pattern as ruff/SKILL.md

lspServers command uses ty@latest which always fetches the newest release; a breaking or compromised release auto-deploys to all plugin users — Line 27: args contains "ty@latest" — resolves to newest PyPI release at LSP server startup, not a fixed version
